title: Silhouette Universe Collectible Narrative Poster AI
sourceTitle: Silhouette Universe Collectible Narrative Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Collectible silhouette-universe narrative poster built around lone astronaut figure, with a complete symbolic world grown through spiral galaxy and tiny exploration scenes. Subject: lone astronaut figure forms the dominant elegant silhouette carrier; spiral galaxy and tiny exploration scenes naturally grows inside, along, above, and around the silhouette boundary instead of looking like a random world pasted into a container. Scene: Epic poetic poster space with layered narrative environments, symbolic architecture, paths, bridges, fog, light sources, tiny civilization traces, foreground-midground-background depth, and a clean collectible poster atmosphere. Composition: Fixed vertical poster composition: one unmistakable central silhouette occupies the core, the inner universe follows its contour logic, the title OUTER QUIET sits in refined poster typography, and negative space keeps the silhouette readable at thumbnail size. Signature Elements: lone astronaut figure, spiral galaxy and tiny exploration scenes, a world integrated with the silhouette structure, symbolic pathways, light sources, fog, architectural or natural micro-scenes, clear silhouette boundary, and refined title OUTER QUIET. Style: High-aesthetic collectible narrative poster with cinematic mystery, elegant symbolism, epic scale, poetic worldbuilding, sophisticated silhouette design, fine environmental detail, and premium art-print finish. Color Palette: Deep cinematic shadows, controlled luminous highlights, atmospheric gradients, muted narrative-world colors chosen to support the theme, and refined title contrast without noisy saturation. Lighting: Dramatic rim light on the main silhouette, volumetric glow inside the universe, misty depth layers, tiny practical lights, and high contrast between silhouette edge and background. Camera: Poster-like straight-on composition with clear silhouette readability, layered miniature-world perspective, and balanced vertical framing. Typography: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Collectible silhouette-universe narrative poster built around mountain climber, with a complete symbolic world grown through snow ridge, sunrise, route lines, tiny camp lights. Subject: mountain climber forms the dominant elegant silhouette carrier; snow ridge, sunrise, route lines, tiny camp lights naturally grows inside, along, above, and around the silhouette boundary instead of looking like a random world pasted into a container. Scene: Epic poetic poster space with layered narrative environments, symbolic architecture, paths, bridges, fog, light sources, tiny civilization traces, foreground-midground-background depth, and a clean collectible poster atmosphere. Composition: Fixed vertical poster composition: one unmistakable central silhouette occupies the core, the inner universe follows its contour logic, the title HIGHER AIR sits in refined poster typography, and negative space keeps the silhouette readable at thumbnail size. Signature Elements: mountain climber, snow ridge, sunrise, route lines, tiny camp lights, a world integrated with the silhouette structure, symbolic pathways, light sources, fog, architectural or natural micro-scenes, clear silhouette boundary, and refined title HIGHER AIR. Style: High-aesthetic collectible narrative poster with cinematic mystery, elegant symbolism, epic scale, poetic worldbuilding, sophisticated silhouette design, fine environmental detail, and premium art-print finish. Color Palette: Deep cinematic shadows, controlled luminous highlights, atmospheric gradients, muted narrative-world colors chosen to support the theme, and refined title contrast without noisy saturation. Lighting: Dramatic rim light on the main silhouette, volumetric glow inside the universe, misty depth layers, tiny practical lights, and high contrast between silhouette edge and background. Typography: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
